outcome.summary: Independently validated archived spec and diagram materials. Specification is complete and traceable. Diagram package has 98 missing files due to missing raw-validation-output directory and 2 size mismatches in the manifest.

acceptance_criteria.name: Package structure integrity
acceptance_criteria.evidence: 98 missing files in diagrams package (raw-validation-output entirely missing)

acceptance_criteria.name: Diagram source/rendered consistency
acceptance_criteria.evidence: 25/25 Draw.io vs Mermaid semantic equivalence PASS

validation.name: Diagrams file references
validation.evidence: All 25 diagrams indexed have drawio/svg/html files present

validation.name: Absolute paths scan
validation.evidence: Checked all files; only /private/tmp found in a migration log

validation.name: Semantic edge-tuple check
validation.evidence: drawio edge-tuple check matches Mermaid index 25/25

deviations: The raw-validation-output folder is entirely missing in the diagrams package.

impacts.architecture: No product code change; archive validation only.
impacts.security: Clean. No private keys or absolute paths leaked.
impacts.integration: Draft validation PR created targeting main.
impacts.residual_risk: Interactive UI/browser console checks remain outstanding (HUMAN_REVIEW_PENDING).

decisions_required: Accept diagrams package without the raw machine outputs.
Regenerate manifest to exclude missing files and correct hashes.
recommended_next_action: Product Owner reviews validation findings and decides on acceptance.
